rows.notes: Selected 'Annuagia recipienda' from gpt-5-mini as it is a more accurate visual reading than 'Ameraragia recipienda' from gemini-flash. Both extractors correctly identified the row type and absence of monetary amounts.
This header row was only found by gemini-flash. Visually confirmed as a clear header for the monetary columns.

rows.description: Longwittenham Rect. pro anno. Vide Rec. varia.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description 'Longwittenham' for accuracy. Consensus on pounds, shillings, and pence values. Selected gemini-flash's interpretation of the '4' after pence as a 0.25 fraction, which is visually supported by its placement and consistency with other fraction notations on the page. gpt-5-mini dismissed it as an ambiguous flourish.
rows.english_description: Annual income from the rectory of Long Wittenham; see various receipts.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual income from the rectory of Long Wittenham, amounting to £80 8s 6¼d.
